sentence: The early bird catches the worm.
Every cloud has a silver lining.
translation: 모든 구름에는 은빛 테두리가 있다. (나쁜 일에도 좋은 면이 있다)

sentence: Time flies when you are having fun.
Where there is a will there is a way.
You only live once, so make it count.
In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
Knowledge is power when you put it into action.
translation: 지식은 실행으로 옮길 때 힘이 된다.

sentence: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
translation: 성공은 끝이 아니고, 실패는 치명적이지 않다.
